name: Nashville
content: Nashville downtown, from what I was able to gather, is full of drunk wannabe cowboys and bachelor and bachelorette parties. It was here that I learned of the party bus, which is a bus with a dancefloor and wraparound clear windows that drives you around downtown while you party. In my opinion it looks like a miserable and motionsickness-inducing experience, along with just being a hazard for falling over into other people if the bus lurches or has to hit the brakes. Though perhaps some of those motion-related issues are mitigated by the fact that the buses are stuck in traffic and can’t move anyway. Personally I think the beer bikes I saw in Nashville are a better idea A better idea is not to be confused with a good idea.. To each their own I suppose.
